subagents.title: W2-ST Strategy Architect
subagents.system_instruction: You are a senior Python execution-engine architect. Design robust strategy abstractions and iterative execution loops. Be explicit about async behavior, factory wiring, and backward compatibility.

parsed_output.summary: Implement ExecutionStrategy abstraction and iterative execution loop enhancement.

code_changes.purpose: Add ExecutionStrategy ABC and DagOnceStrategy to define execution strategies.
operations: Define ExecutionStrategy as an abstract base class (ABC) with required methods.
Implement DagOnceStrategy inheriting from ExecutionStrategy with specific logic.
Add a factory method to instantiate strategies based on configuration.
Ensure backward compatibility by checking existing strategy types.

code_changes.purpose: Enhance iterative execution with failure repair loop and event handling.
operations: Create an iterative repair loop to handle execution retries.
Integrate attempt-level events logging within the iterative process.

tests.name: test_execution_strategy_inheritance
tests.asserts: Verify DagOnceStrategy correctly implements ExecutionStrategy interface.

tests.name: test_strategy_factory_creation
tests.asserts: Ensure factory method creates the correct strategy instance.

tests.name: test_iterative_repair_loop
tests.asserts: Check that iterative loop retries on failure as expected.

tests.name: test_attempt_level_events
tests.asserts: Validate that event logging happens at each attempt level.

risks: Changes to execution strategies may affect current workflows; mitigate by extensive regression testing of existing strategies.
acceptance_checks: All new tests pass and existing functionality is preserved without errors.

Adequate depth of implementation with core elements such as the abstract base class and specific strategies is present.
The inclusion of tests demonstrates a commitment to testability, with appropriate coverage for the new functionality.

subagents.title: W2-AG Scoring Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are a scoring/evaluation systems engineer. Design per-agent scoring schemas and statistically sound reporting bundles. Prioritize deterministic outputs and schema compatibility.

parsed_output.summary: Add agent_scores payload and enhance reporting bundle stats in server evaluation.

code_changes.purpose: Introduce agent_scores payload for better agent performance insights.
operations: Define agent_scores data structure following established scoring schemas.
Implement logic to compute and populate agent_scores based on evaluation results.

code_changes.purpose: Update message contracts to include the new agent_scores payload.
operations: Modify existing message definitions to incorporate agent_scores field.
Ensure backward compatibility for existing message formats.

tests.name: test_agent_scores_payload_in_evaluation
tests.asserts: Verifies the agent_scores payload is included and correctly formatted.

tests.name: test_reliability_adjustment_calculation
tests.asserts: Checks if reliability adjustment affects the reporting bundle stats correctly.

tests.name: test_reporting_bundle_statistics
tests.asserts: Ensures the new statistics reflect changes and calculations of agent_scores.

risks: Introduced changes may affect existing evaluations; mitigation by thorough unit and integration tests.
acceptance_checks: All tests must pass including new tests for agent_scores.
Evaluation reporting must still comply with existing format and maintain backward compatibility.

subagents.title: W2-AD Adapter Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are an integration adapter engineer. Design framework adapters with strict contract conformance and graceful optional dependencies.

parsed_output.summary: Add optional import behavior and canonical event mapping for Microsoft Agent Framework integration.

code_changes.purpose: Implement optional import behavior to enhance flexibility and include canonical event mapping for standardized integration.
operations: Add try-except block for optional importing of external libraries used in the Microsoft Agent Framework.
Implement canonical event mapping function to standardize event structures from the framework.

tests.name: test_microsoft_adapter_optional_import
tests.asserts: Verify that optional import does not break existing functionality and initializes correctly.

tests.name: test_microsoft_adapter_event_mapping
tests.asserts: Ensure that events are transformed into canonical form correctly.

tests.name: test_microsoft_adapter_integration
tests.asserts: Confirm integration with Microsoft Agent Framework works according to defined contracts.

dependencies: W2-ST-001: engine/strategy.py for event handling strategy.
Existing integration tests for backward compatibility.
risks: Optional import may lead to runtime errors if the module is not available; mitigate by ensuring fallback behavior is well defined.
Changes in event mapping could affect existing workflows; mitigate by maintaining a detailed mapping audit and thorough testing.
acceptance_checks: All test cases pass without failures.
Backward compatibility verified through integration tests.

subagents.title: W2-UI Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are a frontend engineer for React+TypeScript dashboards. Design compatibility-aware UI states and transparent score breakdown UX tied to backend payloads.

parsed_output.summary: Implement dataset selector filters based on workflow compatibility and add a score breakdown panel with detailed criteria.

code_changes.purpose: Add logic to filter datasets by workflow compatibility.
operations: Add new endpoint GET /api/eval/datasets?workflow=... to retrieve compatible datasets.
Implement compatibility checks based on workflow parameters.

code_changes.purpose: Integrate REST API to fetch filtered datasets based on the selected workflow.
operations: Add state management for selected workflow and datasets.
Update UI components to reflect available datasets and disable incompatible options.

code_changes.purpose: Display detailed score breakdown, including criteria, weights, and failures.
operations: Create a score breakdown component to visualize scores.
Ensure integration with the backend to fetch agent_scores payload.

tests.name: test_dataset_selector_filters
tests.asserts: Datasets are filtered correctly based on selected workflow.

tests.name: test_score_breakdown_panel
tests.asserts: Score breakdown displays criteria, weights, and hard-gate failures correctly.

risks: Modification might affect existing dataset retrieval logic; mitigate by ensuring comprehensive test coverage.
UI may not load data correctly if API response changes; mitigate by using feature flags and monitoring during deployment.
acceptance_checks: Verify that dataset filters respond correctly to workflow selections and that score breakdown is accurate.

subagents.title: Wave2 QA Reviewer
subagents.focus: Wave 2 end-to-end regression and test coverage
subagents.system_instruction: You are a principal QA reviewer. Identify regression risks, missing tests, and release gates for Wave 2 integration.

parsed_output.summary: Wave 2 integration introduces new strategies and UI components while ensuring backward compatibility and test stability.

code_changes.purpose: Implement ExecutionStrategy ABC and DagOnceStrategy to standardize execution methods.
operations: Add ExecutionStrategy ABC interface
Implement DagOnceStrategy with factory method

code_changes.purpose: Integrate iterative repair loop and attempt-level event logging.
operations: Implement iterative repair loop logic
Add event tracking to each attempt

code_changes.purpose: Enhance server response with agent_scores and reporting adjustments.
operations: Add agent_scores payload to response
Implement reliability adjustment logic

code_changes.purpose: Define message contracts to include new data fields.
operations: Update data contracts to include new agent_scores fields
Adjust existing contracts for backward compatibility

code_changes.purpose: Enhance dataset selection based on workflow compatibility.
operations: Implement filtering logic based on workflows
Ensure existing endpoints remain functional

code_changes.purpose: Display score breakdown with criteria-based feedback.
operations: Add UI elements for criteria, weights, grades
Implement hard-gate failure visuals

code_changes.purpose: Add optional import behavior and adapt event mapping.
operations: Implement optional import handling
Map canonical events to Microsoft framework

tests.name: test_execution_strategy
tests.asserts: Ensure ExecutionStrategy ABC functions correctly with DagOnceStrategy.

tests.name: test_iterative_repair_loop
tests.asserts: Verify the correctness of the iterative repair process.

tests.name: test_agent_scores_payload
tests.asserts: Validate the agent_scores is returned correctly from the API.

tests.name: test_dataset_filtering
tests.asserts: Check that datasets are filtered based on workflow compatibility.

tests.name: test_score_breakdown_panel
tests.asserts: Confirm the score breakdown panel displays correct criteria and weights.

tests.name: test_microsoft_adapter_import
tests.asserts: Ensure the optional Microsoft agent import logic works as expected.

dependencies: W2-UI-001 depends on W2-AG-001 for data
risks: Changes to the strategy layer might affect existing execution flows + Mitigation: Conduct regression testing on all execution scenarios.
New UI components may not align with existing workflows + Mitigation: Implement cross-component integration tests.
acceptance_checks: All end-to-end tests must pass in the integration environment before release.
